
# Knowledge Files Descriptions (Sent to AI for selection)

- nats_service.md
    - Summary: A Rust code example demonstrating how to implement a NATS service using the async_nats crate, featuring service building, endpoint grouping (min/max), and asynchronous request handling.
    - When To Use: Use this file as a reference when building microservices or request-response systems with NATS in Rust, specifically for learning how to use the Service API.
    - Functions: main, decode_input
